name: research-pipeline
summary: Split investigation from planning: new /research command with progressive structure, restructure blueprint's early stages for solution-scoping focus, establish optional-enrichment pattern for inter-workflow communication, deprecate /clarify
describe_digest: 4-part change: /research command + blueprint restructure + optional-enrichment pattern + /clarify deprecation. Full path, family challenge mode.
spec_digest: 8 work units (WU5 collapsed into WU4). /research has 4 stages (orient→investigate→synthesize→gate). Blueprint pre-stage conditional on research brief. Ambiguity gate parameterized. Prior-art gate conditionalized. /clarify soft-deprecated. Topic sanitization, overwrite confirmation, linked_blueprint field, multi-session listing, staleness warning all specified.
adversarial_digest: Family debate: 7 revisions (2 critical: tier 2.5 enforcement, linked_blueprint). Edge cases: 3 MUST FIX (sanitization, overwrite, linkage), 4 SHOULD FIX. Pre-mortem: 2 medium (evals, vault dir). No regressions.
key_decisions: Heavy unburdening — blueprint describe refocused on solution scoping
Optional enrichment, not dependency — blueprint works without research
Conditional stage inclusion based on coverage manifest in research brief
Parameterized ambiguity gate — same mechanism, different rubrics
Prior-art gate conditionally runs in blueprint when no research brief
Tier 2.5 enforcement for /research (not MUST, not Utility) — vault precedent
linked_blueprint field in brief frontmatter — explicit link, not path inference
Topic sanitization for file paths — slug separate from display name
required_revisions_before_wu1: F5: 48h staleness warning in deep-mode resume
E4: findings_count on confirmed write in §1.5
E5: Blueprint re-reads brief on resume in §5.2
F6: Lightweight path surfacing in pre-stage
F8: 3-case decision table in clarify redirect
Dead field: Remove design_check from coverage block
PM-1: Behavioral eval fixtures in WU9
